(1) Suspending And Removing Trustee; 920 Apponting Successor Trustee; (3) Compelling An Accounting;
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Continued To Jan-12-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were called together:
1) PTR-25-308078, 1993 Borsuk Family Trust; and
2) PTR-25-308080, Irrevocable Trust fbo Suzanne Borsuk.

Appearances:
Christen E. Bourne for beneficiary Suzanne Borsuk (via Zoom).
Henry Norwood for respondent Mark Borsuk (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on:
1) Petition for Order Compelling Trustee to Distribute Trust Assets to Beneficiaries, Barring Trustee's Use of Trust Funds for Litigation, and Awarding Petitioner Attorneys' Fees and Costs; and
2) Petition for Order Suspending and Removing Trustee, Appointing Successor Trustee, Compelling an Accounting, and Barring Trustee's Use of Trust Funds for Litigation.

Ms. Bourne reported that the signed order appointing the temporary trustee had been received only a few weeks earlier and was served on both respondent and the temporary trustee approximately one and a half weeks ago. She explained that the matters were in the early stages, the temporary trustee was in the process of retaining counsel, and respondent was currently out of town. She requested a 90-day continuance. Mr. Norwood agreed that a continuance was appropriate.

The Court continued the matter to January 12, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order: (1) Suspending And Removing Trustee; 920 Apponting Successor Trustee; (3) Compelling An Accounting; And (4) Barring Trustee'S Use Of Trust Founds For Litigation
Off Calendar Jul-30-2025 Continued To Oct-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PTR-25-308078 In the Matter of the 1993 Borsuk Family Trust and PTR-25-308080 In the Matter of the Irrevocable Trust FBO Suzanne Borsuk.

Appearances:
David Little appeared via zoom for Mark Borsuk (trustee).
Christen Bourne and John Clark appeared via zoom for Suzanne Borsuk (petitioner).

Mr. Little from the outset of the hearing stated that his client has not been wasting the assets from the trust, that he has made distributions to Suzanne, that the parking lot located in Oakland is need of repairs, and that he will need funds from the trust to make the necessary repairs.

Ms. Bourne stated that for 5 years the trust has not been properly funded, that trust provides Suzanne be the trustee of the Irrevocable Trust, and that she suggests Peninsula Bay Trust Company to be appointed as successor trustee.

The matters are continued to October 13, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Court suspends Mark Boursak as trustee.

The Court also approved the stipulation.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
